content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1/5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift:14-21 gates the App Store write-review URL behind a custom in-app star rating (only stars≥4 get the itms-apps write-review link, lower ratings are diverted to a feedback form instead), and description.txt explicitly asks users to "rate us 5 stars!"

Pierre: This is a textbook rating-manipulation dark pattern — Apple requires using `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview()` (or the new `RequestReview` environment action), which is shown to all users at Apple's discretion, never gated by a pre-filter that only lets happy users reach it. Also, direct `write-review` deep links plus copy that begs for "5 stars" both violate 5.6.1/5.6.3 review-manipulation rules. Fix: replace the custom star gate and direct URL with `requestReview()` shown unconditionally (rate-limited by the system), and remove the "rate us 5 stars" language from the description.
